title: E2E R2: One-shot — temperature converter with tests
body: Write converter.py with functions: celsius_to_fahrenheit(c), fahrenheit_to_celsius(f), celsius_to_kelvin(c), kelvin_to_celsius(k), fahrenheit_to_kelvin(f), kelvin_to_fahrenheit(k). Each must raise ValueError for temperatures below absolute zero (-273.15°C / -459.67°F / 0K). Write test_converter.py with pytest tests covering: standard conversions (0°C=32°F=273.15K, 100°C=212°F=373.15K), negative temps, absolute zero boundary, ValueError for below absolute zero. All files in the working directory.

cycle.prompt: Plan the implementation. List all functions, their formulas, edge cases, and test cases.
Implement the plan. Write converter.py and test_converter.py to disk.
Fix the validation errors. Make the minimum change needed to pass.
